summary: Full backend implementation for ECP Pay completed

files_implemented.description: Internal payment provider with full simulation: PIX (QR code + scheduled settlement), Card (brand detection, RN-05/RN-06 rules, tokenization), Boleto (barcode generation), Refund (full/partial), status query, webhook parsing
Settlement scheduler using setInterval (1s). Processes pending settlements, updates transaction status, generates webhook events, delivers callbacks
Mock Pix EMV QR code generator with BR Code structure and base64 encoding
Mock FEBRABAN-format boleto generator with 44-digit barcode and formatted digitable line
Asaas adapter with real HTTP calls via fetch(), customer management, PIX/Card/Boleto creation, refund, status query, webhook parsing. Requires ASAAS_API_KEY env var.
Bidirectional mappers: Asaas status to TransactionStatus, billing types, event types, card brands
Asaas webhook parser with token validation and event normalization
Payment orchestrator: idempotency check, provider delegation, DB persistence, audit logging. Handles PIX, Card, Boleto, getTransaction, refundTransaction
Card vault: listCardsByCustomer, deleteCardToken (soft delete), saveToken
Webhook processor: event dedup via webhook_events table, transaction status update, callback triggering
Callback delivery via HTTP POST to source app's callback URL with structured payload. Retry support for failed callbacks.
Callback retry scheduler (30s interval). Exponential backoff: 30s, 2min, 10min. Max 3 attempts (RN-10)
Split service: createSplit with sum validation (RN-09), getSplitsByTransaction
Admin login (bcrypt + JWT) and /auth/me endpoint
Dashboard KPIs: total volume, tx count, success rate, by type, by app, by status, today stats, last 10 transactions, provider info
Paginated transaction list with filters (type, status, source_app, date range, search, amount range), detail with timeline, summary, simulate-payment (internal mode)
Provider info with stats, switch provider with audit logging
Feature flags CRUD, audit logs with pagination and filters, general config get/update
App registration management: list with stats, create (generate API key), update (callback URL, active status, regenerate key)
Full seed: admin user (bcrypt), 3 feature flags, 3 app registrations, 20 mixed transactions (7 pix, 8 card, 5 boleto), 3 card tokens, 5 splits (ecp-food), 10 webhook events, 1 refund record
Updated to run seed on startup, start settlement scheduler (internal mode), start callback retry scheduler

business_rules_implemented.RN-01: Idempotency via idempotency_key check in payment.service.ts
business_rules_implemented.RN-02: All amounts in centavos (integer) throughout the codebase
business_rules_implemented.RN-03: Provider flag via ProviderFactory + feature_flags table
business_rules_implemented.RN-04: Pix auto-settlement via internal.scheduler.ts with configurable delay
business_rules_implemented.RN-05: Card approved if amount < 1000000 and last4 != 9999
business_rules_implemented.RN-07: Boleto with mock barcode, manual payment via simulate-payment endpoint
business_rules_implemented.RN-08: Card tokens stored per CPF/CNPJ, reusable cross-app
business_rules_implemented.RN-11: Soft delete only (card tokens use deleted_at + is_active=0)
business_rules_implemented.RN-12: Audit log on every action via auditLog() helper
business_rules_implemented.RN-16: Card numbers never stored, only token+last4+brand
